canvas.html:
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">
<head>
<meta charset="UTF-8">
<meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
<title>kaleidoscope</title>
<style>
* { margin: 0; padding: 0; box-sizing: border-box; }
body { background: #000; overflow: hidden; }
canvas { display: block; }
</style>
</head>
<body>
<canvas id="c"></canvas>
<script>
const canvas = document.getElementById('c');
const ctx = canvas.getContext('2d');

let W, H, cx, cy;
let mouseX = 0, mouseY = 0;
let rotation = 0;
let segments = 8;
let seedShapes = [];
let patternSeed = 0;
let audioCtx, masterGain;
let oscillators = [];
let audioStarted = false;

function resize() {
  W = canvas.width = window.innerWidth;
  H = canvas.height = window.innerHeight;
  cx = W / 2;
  cy = H / 2;
}
resize();
window.addEventListener('resize', resize);

// Mouse tracking
document.addEventListener('mousemove', e => {
  mouseX = e.clientX;
  mouseY = e.clientY;
});

// Click to change pattern
document.addEventListener('click', e => {
  patternSeed++;
  generateShapes();
  if (!audioStarted) initAudio();
  playChime();
});

// Scroll to change symmetry
document.addEventListener('wheel', e => {
  segments = Math.max(3, Math.min(16, segments + Math.sign(e.deltaY)));
  updateHarmonics();
});

function initAudio() {
  if (audioStarted) return;
  audioCtx = new (window.AudioContext || window.webkitAudioContext)();
  masterGain = audioCtx.createGain();
  masterGain.gain.value = 0.08;
  masterGain.connect(audioCtx.destination);
  
  // Create harmonic drones based on symmetry
  const baseFreq = 55; // A1
  for (let i = 0; i < 5; i++) {
    const osc = audioCtx.createOscillator();
    const gain = audioCtx.createGain();
    osc.type = 'sine';
    osc.frequency.value = baseFreq * (i + 1);
    gain.gain.value = 0.15 / (i + 1);
    osc.connect(gain);
    gain.connect(masterGain);
    osc.start();
    oscillators.push({ osc, gain });
  }
  audioStarted = true;
  updateHarmonics();
}

function updateHarmonics() {
  if (!audioStarted) return;
  const baseFreq = 55 * (segments / 8);
  oscillators.forEach((o, i) => {
    o.osc.frequency.setTargetAtTime(baseFreq * (i + 1), audioCtx.currentTime, 0.3);
  });
}

function playChime() {
  if (!audioCtx) return;
  const osc = audioCtx.createOscillator();
  const gain = audioCtx.createGain();
  osc.type = 'triangle';
  osc.frequency.value = 440 * Math.pow(2, (segments - 8) / 12);
  gain.gain.value = 0.3;
  gain.gain.exponentialDecayTo = gain.gain.exponentialRampToValueAtTime.bind(gain.gain);
  osc.connect(gain);
  gain.connect(masterGain);
  osc.start();
  gain.gain.exponentialRampToValueAtTime(0.001, audioCtx.currentTime + 0.5);
  osc.stop(audioCtx.currentTime + 0.5);
}

// Shape class for kaleidoscope elements
class Shape {
  constructor() {
    this.reset();
  }
  
  reset() {
    this.type = Math.floor(Math.random() * 4); // 0: circle, 1: triangle, 2: rect, 3: line
    this.x = Math.random() * 200 - 100;
    this.y = Math.random() * 200 - 100;
    this.size = Math.random() * 30 + 10;
    this.angle = Math.random() * Math.PI * 2;
    this.vx = (Math.random() - 0.5) * 0.5;
    this.vy = (Math.random() - 0.5) * 0.5;
    this.va = (Math.random() - 0.5) * 0.02;
    this.hue = Math.random();
    this.alpha = Math.random() * 0.5 + 0.3;
  }
  
  update() {
    this.x += this.vx;
    this.y += this.vy;
    this.angle += this.va;
    
    // Bounds check - stay in viewable triangle
    const dist = Math.sqrt(this.x * this.x + this.y * this.y);
    if (dist > 250) {
      this.x *= 0.95;
      this.y *= 0.95;
    }
  }
  
  draw(ctx) {
    ctx.save();
    ctx.translate(this.x, this.y);
    ctx.rotate(this.angle);
    
    // Color palette: pink, cyan, purple
    let color;
    if (this.hue < 0.33) {
      color = `rgba(255, 50, 150, ${this.alpha})`; // pink
    } else if (this.hue < 0.66) {
      color = `rgba(0, 255, 255, ${this.alpha})`; // cyan
    } else {
      color = `rgba(180, 50, 255, ${this.alpha})`; // purple
    }
    
    ctx.fillStyle = color;
    ctx.strokeStyle = color;
    ctx.lineWidth = 2;
    
    switch (this.type) {
      case 0: // circle
        ctx.beginPath();
        ctx.arc(0, 0, this.size / 2, 0, Math.PI * 2);
        ctx.fill();
        break;
      case 1: // triangle
        ctx.beginPath();
        for (let i = 0; i < 3; i++) {
          const a = (i / 3) * Math.PI * 2;
          const px = Math.cos(a) * this.size / 2;
          const py = Math.sin(a) * this.size / 2;
          if (i === 0) ctx.moveTo(px, py);
          else ctx.lineTo(px, py);
        }
        ctx.closePath();
        ctx.fill();
        break;
      case 2: // rectangle
        ctx.fillRect(-this.size / 2, -this.size / 4, this.size, this.size / 2);
        break;
      case 3: // line
        ctx.beginPath();
        ctx.moveTo(-this.size / 2, 0);
        ctx.lineTo(this.size / 2, 0);
        ctx.stroke();
        break;
    }
    ctx.restore();
  }
}

function generateShapes() {
  seedShapes = [];
  const count = 8 + (patternSeed % 8);
  for (let i = 0; i < count; i++) {
    seedShapes.push(new Shape());
  }
}
generateShapes();

function drawKaleidoscope(time) {
  const radius = Math.min(W, H) * 0.45;
  const segmentAngle = (Math.PI * 2) / segments;
  
  // Mouse affects rotation speed
  const dx = mouseX - cx;
  const dy = mouseY - cy;
  const mouseAngle = Math.atan2(dy, dx);
  const mouseDist = Math.sqrt(dx * dx + dy * dy);
  rotation += 0.003 + (mouseDist / W) * 0.01;
  
  // Create clipping path for circle boundary
  ctx.save();
  ctx.beginPath();
  ctx.arc(cx, cy, radius, 0, Math.PI * 2);
  ctx.clip();
  
  // Draw each kaleidoscope segment
  for (let i = 0; i < segments; i++) {
    const angle = segmentAngle * i + rotation;
    const flip = i % 2 === 1;
    
    ctx.save();
    ctx.translate(cx, cy);
    ctx.rotate(angle);
    
    if (flip) {
      ctx.scale(1, -1);
    }
    
    // Clip to segment wedge
    ctx.beginPath();
    ctx.moveTo(0, 0);
    ctx.lineTo(radius * 1.5, 0);
    ctx.arc(0, 0, radius * 1.5, 0, segmentAngle);
    ctx.closePath();
    ctx.clip();
    
    // Draw shapes
    seedShapes.forEach(shape => shape.draw(ctx));
    
    ctx.restore();
  }
  
  ctx.restore();
  
  // Outer ring glow
  const gradient = ctx.createRadialGradient(cx, cy, radius - 10, cx, cy, radius + 30);
  gradient.addColorStop(0, 'rgba(255, 50, 150, 0.3)');
  gradient.addColorStop(0.5, 'rgba(0, 255, 255, 0.2)');
  gradient.addColorStop(1, 'rgba(0, 0, 0, 0)');
  ctx.fillStyle = gradient;
  ctx.beginPath();
  ctx.arc(cx, cy, radius + 30, 0, Math.PI * 2);
  ctx.fill();
  
  // Center jewel
  const centerGrad = ctx.createRadialGradient(cx, cy, 0, cx, cy, 20);
  centerGrad.addColorStop(0, 'rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.9)');
  centerGrad.addColorStop(0.3, 'rgba(0, 255, 255, 0.6)');
  centerGrad.addColorStop(0.7, 'rgba(255, 50, 150, 0.3)');
  centerGrad.addColorStop(1, 'rgba(0, 0, 0, 0)');
  ctx.fillStyle = centerGrad;
  ctx.beginPath();
  ctx.arc(cx, cy, 20, 0, Math.PI * 2);
  ctx.fill();
}

function animate(time) {
  // Fade trail
  ctx.fillStyle = 'rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.15)';
  ctx.fillRect(0, 0, W, H);
  
  // Update shapes
  seedShapes.forEach(shape => shape.update());
  
  // Draw kaleidoscope
  drawKaleidoscope(time);
  
  // Subtle vignette
  const vignette = ctx.createRadialGradient(cx, cy, 0, cx, cy, Math.max(W, H) * 0.7);
  vignette.addColorStop(0, 'rgba(0, 0, 0, 0)');
  vignette.addColorStop(1, 'rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.5)');
  ctx.fillStyle = vignette;
  ctx.fillRect(0, 0, W, H);
  
  // Segment count indicator
  ctx.fillStyle = 'rgba(255, 50, 150, 0.5)';
  ctx.font = '12px monospace';
  ctx.fillText(`${segments}-fold symmetry`, 20, H - 20);
  
  requestAnimationFrame(animate);
}

animate(0);
</script>
</body>
</html>
